data.body:
It's cheaper to land in a body of water.  Cuts down weight requirements of onboard retro rockets and fuel and they don't have to slow down past their own mass acceleration - they just have to meet the requirements of a softer buoyant landing. 

Smarter than wasting tons of fuel.
